title: Geronimo Stilton
titleZh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿（特别篇）
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When blue spots break out across New Mouse City, Geronimo and his friends race to find a cure before every tail falls off! 🐭

q.en: What strange disease suddenly breaks out across New Mouse City?
q.zh: 新鼠城里突然爆发了什么奇怪的疾病？

options.en: Green Fur Flu
Blue Spot Disease (rodentia spotilitis)
Yellow Tail Itch according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 黄尾痒（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Red Spot Fever

explain.en: The TV news reports rodents struck by a contagious disease that produces strange blue spots; Professor Brainymouse later names it rodentia spotilitis.
explain.zh: 电视新闻说老鼠们染上了一种会冒出奇怪蓝斑的传染病；后来布莱鼠教授把它命名为“鼠类斑疹”。

q.en: Who is Hercule Poirat in the story?
q.zh: 故事里的赫库勒·波瓦是谁？

options.en: A private investigator and Geronimo's old friend
options.zh: 一名私家侦探，也是杰罗尼摩的老朋友

options.en: A scientist at the Academy
Geronimo's cousin who loves jokes according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩爱开玩笑的表哥（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The mayor of New Mouse City

explain.en: Hercule Poirat is a famous private detective and Geronimo's friend since preschool; his battle cry is 'Have no fear, Hercule Poirat is here!' and he loves bananas.
explain.zh: 赫库勒·波瓦是个有名的私家侦探，从幼儿园起就是杰罗尼摩的朋友；他的口号是“别害怕，赫库勒·波瓦来啦！”，而且他很爱吃香蕉。

q.en: What is Professor Brainymouse's personal motto?
q.zh: 布莱鼠教授的座右铭是什么？

options.en: Never trust a cat!
Cheese solves everything! according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 奶酪能解决一切！（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Better to prevent than to cure!
Run first, think later!

explain.en: The book gives his motto as 'Better to prevent than to cure!' He is a vegetarian doctor who holds thirteen doctorate degrees.
explain.zh: 书里写的他的座右铭是“预防胜于治疗！”。他是一位素食医生，拥有十三个博士学位。

q.en: Who is secretly disguised as the biotechnologist Wanda McSlice?
q.zh: 伪装成生物技术员旺达·麦克丝莱斯的其实是谁？

options.en: Geronimo's sister Thea
Sally Ratmousen's cousin, the notorious thief called the Shadow
options.zh: 莎莉·鼠托森的表妹，绰号“影子”的著名女飞贼

options.en: Professor Brainymouse's assistant Rick according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 布莱鼠教授的助手里克（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The mayor's secretary

explain.en: Wanda pulls off her wig to reveal she is the Shadow, Sally Ratmousen's cousin and the most notorious thief in New Mouse City.
explain.zh: 旺达扯下假发，露出真面目——她就是“影子”，莎莉·鼠托森的表妹，也是新鼠城最臭名昭著的飞贼。

q.en: How do the mice finally find the cure for Blue Spot Disease?
q.zh: 老鼠们最终是如何找到蓝斑病的解药的？

options.en: From two missing pages torn from the old book, dropped by the Shadow
options.zh: 靠影子掉落的那本旧书里被撕走的两页

options.en: By asking the mayor
From a dream Geronimo had
options.zh: 从杰罗尼摩做的一个梦里

options.en: By buying it from a foreign lab according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 从国外实验室购买（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Shadow drops two sheets torn from the old rodentia spotilitis book; Benjamin and Bugsy bring them to Professor Brainymouse, who uses them to make the cure.
explain.zh: “影子”掉落了那本旧《鼠类斑疹》书里被撕走的两页；本杰明和巴格西把它交给布莱鼠教授，教授据此制出了解药。

q.en: How is the cure spread across the whole city?
q.zh: 解药是如何喷洒到整个新鼠城的？

options.en: Sally sells it in her factory
Geronimo posts it in his newspaper according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩登在报纸上（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Trap hands it out at a party
Thea flies her plane and sprays it from above
options.zh: 蒂奥驾驶飞机从空中喷洒

explain.en: Sally produces the cure in huge amounts at her factory, and Thea uses her plane to spray it over the city.
explain.zh: 莎莉在自己的工厂里大量生产解药，蒂奥则驾驶飞机从空中把解药喷洒全城。

q.en: What unusual vehicle does Hercule Poirat drive?
q.zh: 赫库勒·波瓦驾驶的是什么特别的交通工具？

options.en: A bicycle with a bell
A red race car
The Bananamobile
A submarine

explain.en: Hercule and the others jump into his Bananamobile and zoom to the school laboratories to deliver the missing pages.
explain.zh: 赫库勒和大家跳上他的“香蕉车”，飞驰到学校实验室去送那两页缺失的书页。

q.en: What does the villain Sleezer always wear to hide his snout?
q.zh: 坏蛋斯利泽为了遮住自己的脸，总是穿戴着什么？

options.en: A dark trench coat and a large-brimmed hat
options.zh: 一件深色风衣和一顶宽边帽

options.en: A bright yellow raincoat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一件亮黄色雨衣（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A pirate eyepatch
A clown nose and wig

explain.en: The book says Sleezer always wears a dark trench coat and a large-brimmed hat to hide his snout; no one even knows his last name.
explain.zh: 书里说斯利泽总是穿着深色风衣、戴着宽边帽来遮住脸；甚至没人知道他的姓氏。

q.en: Where does Professor Brainymouse's team set up their secret research labs?
q.zh: 布莱鼠教授的团队把秘密实验室设在了哪里？

options.en: Inside Sally's cheese factory
At the Academy of Science in the new Science Quarter
options.zh: 新建科学街区的科学院

options.en: On a ship at sea
In the basement of The Rodent's Gazette according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《啮齿动物公报》的地下室（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: They work at the Academy of Science, New Mouse City's top university, in a brand-new neighborhood called the Science Quarter on the city's outskirts.
explain.zh: 他们在科学院工作，那是新鼠城最好的大学，位于城郊一个叫“科学街区”的全新社区。

q.en: How does the Cheese Experiment adventure finally end?
q.zh: 《奶酪实验》这场冒险最终是如何收尾的？

options.en: With the city being evacuated according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 全城被疏散（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: With the Shadow winning
With Geronimo moving away
With Trap's fake blue-spot joke and a big party
options.zh: 以特拉普装蓝斑的恶作剧和一场盛大派对收场

explain.en: Trap paints a fake blue spot on Geronimo as a joke, the disease is cured, and they celebrate with 'Thundering cat tails — let's party!'
explain.zh: 特拉普在杰罗尼摩鼻子上画了个假蓝斑开玩笑，疾病被治愈，大家高喊“雷霆猫尾——开派对吧！”来庆祝。
